title: Neon
body:
![Neon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5gsHRYTQ/images/d14e15f0205275ec44e26684168f827d0bf995b6.png) Neon is a Quality of Life and Utility mod to be used across servers. In order to use this mod you must have Fabric API and the Fabric Kotlin Language Support mod. --------------------------------------- ![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5gsHRYTQ/images/e5105d39edaab659a0a0b97761ef964364d209c9.png)

Neon Stats

/neonstats is a statistics command that prints information about your system, ram, cpu, and loaded mods that copies to your clipboard and formats to discord markdown. THIS IS A PORT OF NOTENOUGHUPDATES /neustats EXAMPLE ```md # System Stats [OS][Mac OS X] [CPU][8x Apple M2] [Display][1470x956 (Apple)] [GPU][Apple M2] [GPU Driver][4.1 Metal - 87] [Maximum Memory][1532MB] # Java Stats [Java][17.0.8.1 64bit] [Memory][ 56% 1153/2048MB] [Memory Allocated][ 74% 1532MB] # Game Stats [FPS][113 fps T: 120 vsyncfancy fancy-clouds B: 2] [Loaded Mods][61] # Mods Loaded [libgui][LibGui 8.1.0+1.20.1] [java][OpenJDK 64-Bit Server VM 17] [neon][Neon 1.0] [libninepatch][LibNinePatch 1.2.0] [jankson][Jankson 6.0.0+j1.2.3] [minecraft][Minecraft 1.20.1] ```
